home.heroTitle: Learn C by actually writing it
home.heroSubtitle: Open a lesson, write real C in your browser, and run it on a real compiler. Earn XP, keep your streak going, and work your way from "Hello, World" to pointers — no setup required.
home.tile1Text: Your code runs on an actual C compiler — not a fake sandbox. Same output, same errors you'd hit in a real terminal.
home.tile2Text: Every lesson earns XP. Level up, keep your daily streak alive, and watch your progress stack up.
home.tile3Text: From printf to pointers, one small step at a time, with a hint waiting whenever you get stuck.
home.tile4Text: Nothing to install, nothing to configure. Open a tab and start coding on any device.
